Question:
This study aims to investigate the association between the Weight-Adjusted Waist Index (WWI) and all-cause mortality using a weighted Cox proportional hazards regression model we will be using exam weights.
The analysis will utilize NHANES data collected between 2011-2012.
The study population will include participants whose age in years at screening is 20 years and older who have either diabetes or prediabetes. 
Diabetes is defined as meeting any of the following conditions: doctor told them they have diabetes, taking insulin now, take diabetic pills to lower blood sugar, a fasting blood glucose (FBG) (mg/dL) of 126 mg/dL or higher, or a glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%) of 6.5 or greater. 
Prediabetes is defined as meeting all of the following criteria: ever told have prediabetes, an fasting blood glucose (FBG) (mg/dL) level between 100 and 126 mg/dL, and glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%) equal or more than 5.7 and less than 6.5%. 
Individuals will be excluded if they are missing the necessary data to calculate the WWI, which are waist circumference (cm) and  weight (kg) or mortality status or  months followup examination
The primary predictor for this analysis is the Weight-Adjusted Waist Index (WWI), calculated as waist circumference (cm) divided by the square root of weight (kg). This index will be categorized into quartiles  Q1: <=25%, Q2: >25 and <=50, Q3: >50 and <=75%, Q4: >75%.
The outcome months followup examination and mortality data. The model will be adjusted for several covariates, including age in years at screening, gender, and race/Hispanic origin (categorized as Mexican American, Other Hispanic, Non-Hispanic White, Non-Hispanic Black, and Other race).
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: weighted cox regression (exam)

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 2011-2012

Inclusion Criteria:
- age in years at screening >= 20
- (doctor told them they have diabetes = Yes OR taking insulin now = Yes OR take diabetic pills to lower blood sugar = Yes OR fasting blood glucose (FBG) (mg/dL) >= 126 OR glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%) >= 6.5)
OR
(ever told have prediabetes = Yes AND fasting blood glucose (FBG) (mg/dL) >= 100 AND fasting blood glucose (FBG) (mg/dL) < 126 AND glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%) >= 5.7 AND glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%) < 6.5)

Exclusion Criteria:
- missing waist circumference (cm)
- missing weight (kg)
- missing mortality status
- missing months followup examination

Covariates:
- age in years at screening
- gender
- race/Hispanic origin categorized as:
  Mexican American,
  Other Hispanic,
  Non-Hispanic White,
  Non-Hispanic Black,
  Other race

Predictor:
- Weight-Adjusted Waist Index (WWI) calculated as:
  waist circumference (cm) / sqrt(weight (kg))
  categorized into quartiles:
    Q1: <=25%
    Q2: >25 and <=50%
    Q3: >50 and <=75%
    Q4: >75%

Outcome:
- time-to-event: months followup examination
- event indicator: mortality data (1 if event, 0 if censored)

SQL:
-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 2.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_g
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL;


-- STEP 2: Create temp_psu_stratum

-- TEMP TABLE FOR PSU and Stratum
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_psu_stratum;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_psu_stratum AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_g;


-- STEP 3: Create final weight+design table
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS weight_design;
CREATE TABLE weight_design AS
SELECT 
    s.respondent_sequence_number,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_stratum,
    w.survey_weight
FROM temp_psu_stratum s
INNER JOIN temp_master_weight w
  ON s.respondent_sequence_number = w.respondent_sequence_number;




-- TEMP TABLE FOR "age in years at screening", "age in years at screening"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_g;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening ON temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "doctor told them they have diabetes"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_g;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes ON temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "taking insulin now"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_taking_insulin_now;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_taking_insulin_now AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "taking_insulin_now" AS "taking_insulin_now"
FROM nhanes.diq_g;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_taking_insulin_now ON temp_master_taking_insulin_now (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "take diabetic pills to lower blood sugar"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar" AS "take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar"
FROM nhanes.diq_g;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar ON temp_master_take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "fasting blood glucose (fbg) (mg/dl)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "fasting_glucose_mg_dl" AS "fasting_glucose_mg_dl"
FROM nhanes.glu_g;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl ON temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "glycohemoglobin (hba1c) (%)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_glycohemoglobin;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_glycohemoglobin AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "glycohemoglobin" AS "glycohemoglobin"
FROM nhanes.ghb_g;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_glycohemoglobin ON temp_master_glycohemoglobin (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "ever told have prediabetes"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_ever_told_you_have_prediabetes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_ever_told_you_have_prediabetes AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "ever_told_you_have_prediabetes" AS "ever_told_you_have_prediabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_g;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_ever_told_you_have_prediabetes ON temp_master_ever_told_you_have_prediabetes (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "waist circumference (cm)", "waist circumference (cm)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_waist_circumference_cm;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_waist_circumference_cm AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "waist_circumference_cm" AS "waist_circumference_cm"
FROM nhanes.bmx_g;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_waist_circumference_cm ON temp_master_waist_circumference_cm (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "weight (kg)", "weight (kg)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight_kg;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight_kg AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "weight_kg" AS "weight_kg"
FROM nhanes.bmx_g;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_weight_kg ON temp_master_weight_kg (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "mortality data", "mortality status"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_mortality_status;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_mortality_status AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "mortality_status" AS "mortality_status"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_g;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_mortality_status ON temp_master_mortality_status (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "months followup examination", "months followup examination"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_months_followup_examination;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_months_followup_examination AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "months_followup_examination" AS "months_followup_examination"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_g;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_months_followup_examination ON temp_master_months_followup_examination (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "gender"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_gender;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_gender AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_g;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_gender ON temp_master_gender (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "race/hispanic origin", "race/hispanic origin"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_race_hispanic_origin;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_g;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_race_hispanic_origin ON temp_master_race_hispanic_origin (respondent_sequence_number);

-- ALL UNIQUE PATIENT IDs
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_all_ids;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_ids AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_taking_insulin_now
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_glycohemoglobin
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_ever_told_you_have_prediabetes
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_waist_circumference_cm
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_weight_kg
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_mortality_status
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_months_followup_examination
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_gender
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_race_hispanic_origin;

-- Add index to the main ID table for the final join
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_all_ids_respondent_sequence_number ON temp_all_ids (respondent_sequence_number);

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t1."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t2."taking_insulin_now",
    t3."take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar",
    t4."fasting_glucose_mg_dl",
    t5."glycohemoglobin",
    t6."ever_told_you_have_prediabetes",
    t7."waist_circumference_cm",
    t8."weight_kg",
    t9."mortality_status",
    t10."months_followup_examination",
    t11."gender",
    t12."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_taking_insulin_now t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_glycohemoglobin t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_ever_told_you_have_prediabetes t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_waist_circumference_cm t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_weight_kg t8 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t8.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_mortality_status t9 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t9.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_months_followup_examination t10 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t10.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t11 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t11.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t12 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t12.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients age 20 years and older at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 20;

-- STEP 1.2: Derive diabetes_condition
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_diabetes_condition AS
SELECT
    f."respondent_sequence_number",
    (
        f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes' OR
        f."taking_insulin_now" = 'Yes' OR
        f."take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar" = 'Yes' OR
        f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" >= 126 OR
        f."glycohemoglobin" >= 6.5
    ) AS "diabetes_condition"
FROM final_master_table f
JOIN temp_inclusion_step1 i ON f."respondent_sequence_number" = i."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 1.3: Derive prediabetes_condition
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_prediabetes_condition AS
SELECT
    f."respondent_sequence_number",
    (
        f."ever_told_you_have_prediabetes" = 'Yes' AND
        f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" >= 100 AND
        f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" < 126 AND
        f."glycohemoglobin" >= 5.7 AND
        f."glycohemoglobin" < 6.5
    ) AS "prediabetes_condition"
FROM final_master_table f
JOIN temp_inclusion_step1 i ON f."respondent_sequence_number" = i."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 1.4: Combine diabetes and prediabetes conditions for inclusion
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step2 AS
SELECT
    dc."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_diabetes_condition dc
JOIN temp_prediabetes_condition pc ON dc."respondent_sequence_number" = pc."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE dc."diabetes_condition" = TRUE OR pc."prediabetes_condition" = TRUE;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients with missing waist circumference (cm)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."waist_circumference_cm" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude patients with missing weight (kg)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."weight_kg" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude patients with missing mortality status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."mortality_status" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude patients with missing months followup examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."months_followup_examination" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Age in years at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT
    c."respondent_sequence_number",
    f."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT
    c."respondent_sequence_number",
    f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Race/Hispanic origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT
    c."respondent_sequence_number",
    CASE
        WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Mexican American' THEN 'Mexican American'
        WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Other Hispanic' THEN 'Other Hispanic'
        WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic White' THEN 'Non-Hispanic White'
        WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic Black' THEN 'Non-Hispanic Black'
        WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Other Race - Including Multi-Racial' THEN 'Other race'
        ELSE NULL
    END AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Weight-Adjusted Waist Index (WWI)
-- Calculate raw WWI
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_wwi_raw AS
SELECT
    c."respondent_sequence_number",
    f."waist_circumference_cm" / SQRT(f."weight_kg") AS "weight_adjusted_waist_index_wwi"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."weight_kg" > 0; -- Ensure no division by zero or negative weight

-- Compute quartile cutoffs for WWI within cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_wwi_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "weight_adjusted_waist_index_wwi") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5)  WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "weight_adjusted_waist_index_wwi") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "weight_adjusted_waist_index_wwi") AS q3
FROM temp_wwi_raw;

-- Assign WWI quartile group
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_weight_adjusted_waist_index_wwi AS
SELECT
    r."respondent_sequence_number",
    CASE
        WHEN r."weight_adjusted_waist_index_wwi" IS NULL THEN NULL
        WHEN r."weight_adjusted_waist_index_wwi" <= (SELECT q1 FROM temp_wwi_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1: <=25%'
        WHEN r."weight_adjusted_waist_index_wwi" > (SELECT q1 FROM temp_wwi_cutoffs) AND r."weight_adjusted_waist_index_wwi" <= (SELECT q2 FROM temp_wwi_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2: >25 and <=50%'
        WHEN r."weight_adjusted_waist_index_wwi" > (SELECT q2 FROM temp_wwi_cutoffs) AND r."weight_adjusted_waist_index_wwi" <= (SELECT q3 FROM temp_wwi_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3: >50 and <=75%'
        ELSE 'Q4: >75%'
    END AS "weight_adjusted_waist_index_wwi"
FROM temp_wwi_raw r;

-- 4.5 Months followup examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_months_followup_examination AS
SELECT
    c."respondent_sequence_number",
    f."months_followup_examination"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.6 Mortality data
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_mortality_data AS
SELECT
    c."respondent_sequence_number",
    f."mortality_status" AS "mortality_data"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  age."age_in_years_at_screening",
  gen."gender",
  race."race_hispanic_origin",
  wwi."weight_adjusted_waist_index_wwi",
  mfe."months_followup_examination",
  md."mortality_data"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_age_in_years_at_screening age ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = age."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_gender gen ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = gen."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin race ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = race."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_weight_adjusted_waist_index_wwi wwi ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = wwi."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_months_followup_examination mfe ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = mfe."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_mortality_data md ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = md."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."age_in_years_at_screening",
    ft."gender",
    ft."race_hispanic_origin",
    ft."weight_adjusted_waist_index_wwi",
    ft."months_followup_examination",
    ft."mortality_data"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";
